moments.title: World Cup Play-Off: England vs France
moments.blurb: England faced France in the FIFA World Cup Third Place Play-Off tonight, broadcast live on BBC One from Miami.

angles.name: Match Recap
angles.copy: Well, that's a wrap on England's World Cup journey! How are we feeling after tonight's Third Place Play-Off against France? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Key Moments
angles.copy: From the early drama to the final whistle – what was your standout moment from England vs France tonight? Let us know!

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The world's top athletes competed today at the London Athletics Meet, part of the Wanda Diamond League series, at the London Stadium.

angles.name: Event Highlights
angles.copy: The London Stadium was buzzing today for the Diamond League! Who impressed you most at the London Athletics Meet? #LondonAthletics

angles.name: Home Hopes
angles.copy: Big performances from British stars like Josh Kerr and Keely Hodgkinson today. What a showcase for athletics in the capital!

moments.title: Bruno Mars at Wembley Stadium
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars kicks off his multi-night 'The Romantic Tour' residency at Wembley Stadium tonight, with further dates on July 19, 22, 24, 25, and 28.

angles.name: Tonight's Gig
angles.copy: Wembley Stadium is about to get romantic! Bruno Mars is LIVE tonight, kicking off his massive residency. Who's there?

angles.name: Tour Dates
angles.copy: Five nights of Bruno Mars at Wembley! If you missed out tonight, you've still got chances on July 19, 22, 24, 25 & 28. Get ready to sing along!

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's biggest music festival, Splendour, takes place this weekend (July 18-19) at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, featuring headliners The Wombats and Snow Patrol.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is ON! Who's soaking up the sun and sounds at Wollaton Hall this weekend? The Wombats and Snow Patrol are ready!

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Nottingham, your weekend soundtrack is sorted! Splendour Festival brings the hits today and tomorrow. What act are you most excited for?

moments.title: Brecon Choir Festival
moments.blurb: The Brecon Choir Festival is happening today in Brecon, Wales, celebrating vocal music.

angles.name: Local Culture
angles.copy: A huge welcome to everyone at the Brecon Choir Festival today! The town is alive with incredible voices. What a sound!

angles.name: Community Event
angles.copy: Celebrating the power of voice in Wales! The Brecon Choir Festival is bringing beautiful music to our community today. Enjoy!

moments.title: The Open Championship Concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale, one of golf's most prestigious tournaments, concludes tomorrow, Sunday 19th July.

angles.name: Final Day Buzz
angles.copy: It all comes down to tomorrow! Who will lift the Claret Jug at Royal Birkdale? The Open Championship is set for a thrilling finish. #TheOpen

angles.name: Weekend Sport
angles.copy: Don't miss the dramatic conclusion of The Open tomorrow. Who's your pick for the champion?

moments.title: Happy 41st Birthday M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and songwriter M.I.A. (Mathangi Arulpragasam), known for hits like 'Paper Planes', turns 41 today.

angles.name: Artist Focus
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible M.I.A.! From 'Paper Planes' to 'Bad Girls', her sound is iconic. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Music Shoutout
angles.copy: Celebrating the visionary M.I.A. on her 41st birthday today! Her influence on global music is undeniable. Drop your favourite M.I.A. tune below!

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday Martha Reeves
moments.blurb: Legendary Motown singer Martha Reeves, lead singer of Martha Reeves and the Vandellas ('Dancing in the Street'), celebrates her 85th birthday today.

angles.name: Motown Legend
angles.copy: Sending huge birthday wishes to the iconic Martha Reeves, turning 85 today! Her voice shaped a generation. What's your top Vandellas track?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the one and only Martha Reeves! Still 'Dancing in the Street' with her timeless hits. Celebrate with us!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May, CBE, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 19th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we raise a guitar to the one and only Brian May, turning 79! What's your favourite Queen riff he's blessed us with?

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true legend! Brian May's 79th birthday is tomorrow. What an incredible career with Queen!

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Begin
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games are set to begin on Thursday, July 23rd, running until August 2nd, bringing thousands of athletes to Scotland.

angles.name: Countdown to Games
angles.copy: Just 5 days until the Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow! Who's ready for 11 days of incredible sport and national pride? #Glasgow2026

angles.name: Sporting Spectacle
angles.copy: Get ready, UK! The Commonwealth Games begin next Thursday in Glasgow. Over 3,000 athletes, 74 nations, one amazing event!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, one of the UK's premier music and arts events, starts next Thursday, July 23rd, running until July 26th in Henham Park, Suffolk.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: 5 days to go until Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park! Who's pitching their tent and ready for a weekend of music, arts & good vibes? #LatitudeFestival

angles.name: Line-up Tease
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Latitude 2026! From big headliners to hidden gems, what acts are you most looking forward to seeing next week?

moments.title: UK Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The latest UK Official Singles Chart (week ending July 22nd) sees Sam Fender & Olivia Dean at Number 1, with World Cup anthems 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' making big moves.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: Your Official Singles Chart update is HERE! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold strong at #1. What are you streaming this weekend?

angles.name: World Cup Impact
angles.copy: World Cup fever hits the charts! 'Wonderwall' by Oasis and 'Three Lions' are back in the Top 3 this week. Pure nostalgia!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin for Many
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays for many children in England officially begin next week, starting July 23rd, bringing an end to the academic year.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: Freedom! Summer school holidays kick off for many next week. What are your big plans for the long break? #SummerHolidays

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Parents, you made it! Summer holidays are here (or almost here!). What family adventures are you planning across Wales?

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash (Saul Hudson), will celebrate his 61st birthday on Wednesday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Get ready to shred! Slash turns 61 on Wednesday. What's your all-time favourite GNR solo from the man in the top hat?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: A true rock icon celebrates his birthday next week! Happy early 61st to the legendary Slash. What a riff master!

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music, acting career, and incredible stage presence, turns 57 on Thursday, July 24th.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate J.Lo! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 next Thursday. What's your ultimate J.Lo party anthem?

angles.name: Diva Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy early birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez! From the dancefloor to the big screen, she's a true superstar. What's your favourite J.Lo era?

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on Saturday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 this Saturday. What's your favourite Rolling Stones track to get you moving?

angles.name: Timeless Icon
angles.copy: An incredible 83 years young! Happy early birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger. His energy is unmatched!
